title: File-scoped module rules and resolver compatibility

source.subject: feat: add file-scoped module rules and diagnostics

body:
Adds **file-scoped module** grammar rules and diagnostics—the declaration model where a `.bd` file can imply module scope without explicit `module` blocks.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`2e4f445`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/2e4f445)
- **Subject:** feat: add file-scoped module rules and diagnostics
- **Completed:** 2026-04-22

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-foundation`

## Relation
Followed by **file-scoped-analysis-hardening**, **module-declaration-compat**, and site docs tasks through end of v0.1.
